title: Strait of Hormuz closed again, Iran says, as ships attacked
summary_cn: 伊朗宣布再次关闭霍尔木兹海峡，禁止商业船只通行，并警告接近的船只将遭攻击。此举源于美国持续封锁伊朗港口，导致全球能源价格上涨。伊朗革命卫队指责美国违反停火协议，而美国表示封锁将持续至达成和平协议。
paragraphs_en: Iran says it is closing the Strait of Hormuz again to commercial vessels and that any ship that approaches it will be targeted.
The closure came as reports emerged of vessels in or near the strait, including a tanker, were targeted by Tehran on Saturday.

The Islamic Revolution Guard Corps (IRGC) blamed a continuing US blockade for its decision, which comes a day after Iran's foreign minister announced the key global shipping channel had been temporarily reopened.
US President Donald Trump said Iran cannot "blackmail" the US with threats regarding the waterway, which Tehran has effectively blocked for nearly two months - causing global energy prices to soar.
The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) Navy warned in a statement on Saturday that "no vessel is to move from its anchorage in the Persian Gulf or the Sea of Oman".
It said a number of vessels had passed through the strait under its management since Friday night, but that it would shut again until the US stopped its blockade of Iranian ports.
"Approaching the Strait of Hormuz will be considered co-operation with the enemy, and the offending vessel will be targeted," the IRGC added.

Trump said on Friday that a naval blockade of Iranian ports would continue until a peace deal was agreed between the two countries. A two-week ceasefire currently in effect is due to expire on 22 April.
The US said it had turned away 23 ships since it began enforcing the blockade on 13 April.
Iran's Supreme National Security Council (SNSC) said this was a violation of the ceasefire agreement and that it would stop the reopening of the strait while it was still in place.

On negotiations to bring about an end to the war, the SNSC said new proposals had been put forward by the US, which Tehran was "currently reviewing and has not yet responded to". Peace talks held earlier this month ended without an agreement.
"We have very good conversations going on. It's working out very well," Trump said about the state of negotiations with Tehran on Saturday.
There have been several reports of vessels being attacked by Iran on Saturday.
Two Iranian gunboats opened fire on a tanker in the strait, the UK Maritime Trade Operations (UKMTO) said.
A container ship was also hit by "an unknown projectile" off the north-eastern coast of Oman, damaging some containers, according to the UKMTO.
Separately, at least two merchant vessels said they were hit by gunfire as they attempted to cross the strait, sources told news agency Reuters.
India's foreign ministry said it had summoned the Iranian ambassador to convey its "deep concern at the shooting incident earlier today involving two Indian-flagged ships in the Strait of Hormuz".

Data from tracking site MarineTraffic showed some vessels were able to make it through the strait while it was briefly open. Others were forced to change their route after  the IRGC denied them access.

About 20% of the world's oil and liquefied natural gas (LNG) is usually transported through the strait, but the number of ships making the journey has dramatically decreased during the recent conflict, which began when the US and Israel attacked Iran on 28 February.

The narrow chokepoint connects the Gulf to the Arabian Sea and is the only way to reach several oil-producing states by sea. The crisis has seen the price of a barrel of oil surge above $100 ($74) at points.
Iran has previously threatened to attack tankers and other ships, as well as warning it had laid mines.
paragraphs_cn: 伊朗表示将再次对商业船只关闭霍尔木兹海峡（Strait of Hormuz），任何接近该海峡的船只都将成为攻击目标。
此次关闭发生在有报道称周六德黑兰（Tehran）针对海峡内或附近的船只（包括一艘油轮）发动袭击之后。
伊斯兰革命卫队（Islamic Revolution Guard Corps，简称IRGC）将其决定归咎于美国持续的封锁，此前一天伊朗外长刚刚宣布这条重要的全球航运通道已暂时重新开放。
美国总统唐纳德·特朗普（Donald Trump）表示，伊朗不能通过威胁这条水道来“勒索”美国——德黑兰已实际封锁该海峡近两个月，导致全球能源价格飙升。
伊斯兰革命卫队海军周六在一份声明中警告称，“任何船只不得从波斯湾或阿曼海的锚地移动”。
声明称，自周五晚以来已有数艘船只在其管理下通过海峡，但将再次关闭，直到美国停止对伊朗港口的封锁。
伊斯兰革命卫队补充说：“接近霍尔木兹海峡将被视为与敌人合作，违规船只将成为攻击目标。”
特朗普周五表示，对伊朗港口的海上封锁将持续到两国达成和平协议为止。目前生效的两周停火协议定于4月22日到期。
美国表示，自4月13日开始执行封锁以来，已驱离了23艘船只。
伊朗最高国家安全委员会（Supreme National Security Council，简称SNSC）称此举违反了停火协议，并表示在封锁仍存在的情况下将停止重新开放海峡。
关于结束战争的谈判，最高国家安全委员会表示美国已提出新提议，德黑兰“目前正在审查，尚未回应”。本月早些时候举行的和平谈判未能达成协议。
特朗普周六谈及与德黑兰的谈判状态时说：“我们正在进行非常好的对话，进展非常顺利。”
周六有多起关于船只遭伊朗袭击的报道。
英国海事贸易行动办公室（UK Maritime Trade Operations，简称UKMTO）称，两艘伊朗炮艇在海峡内向一艘油轮开火。
据英国海事贸易行动办公室称，一艘集装箱船在阿曼东北海岸附近被“不明抛射物”击中，部分集装箱受损。
消息人士告诉路透社（Reuters）新闻机构，另有至少两艘商船表示在试图穿越海峡时遭枪击。
印度外交部表示已召见伊朗大使，就“今天早些时候霍尔木兹海峡涉及两艘印度籍船只的枪击事件表达深切关注”。
追踪网站MarineTraffic的数据显示，一些船只在海峡短暂开放期间得以通过。其他船只因伊斯兰革命卫队拒绝其通行而被迫改变航线。
全球约20%的石油和液化天然气（liquefied natural gas，简称LNG）通常通过该海峡运输，但自2月28日美国和以色列袭击伊朗引发近期冲突以来，通行船只数量急剧减少。
这条狭窄的咽喉要道连接海湾和阿拉伯海，是海上到达多个产油国的唯一途径。危机期间，每桶石油价格一度飙升至100美元（74英镑）以上。
伊朗此前曾威胁要袭击油轮和其他船只，并警告已布设水雷。

keywords.definition_en: A ship or large boat used for transportation on water.
keywords.context_sentence: Iran says it is closing the Strait of Hormuz again to commercial vessels and that any ship that approaches it will be targeted.
keywords.context_translation: 伊朗表示将再次关闭霍尔木兹海峡，禁止商业船只通行，任何接近该海峡的船只都将成为目标。

keywords.definition_en: An act of sealing off a place to prevent goods or people from entering or leaving.
keywords.context_sentence: The Islamic Revolution Guard Corps (IRGC) blamed a continuing US blockade for its decision, which comes a day after Iran's foreign minister announced the key global shipping channel had been temporarily reopened.
keywords.context_translation: 伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）将其决定归咎于美国持续的封锁，这是在伊朗外交部长宣布这一关键全球航运通道已暂时重新开放一天后发生的。

keywords.definition_en: To aim or direct an attack or action at someone or something.
keywords.context_sentence: Iran says it is closing the Strait of Hormuz again to commercial vessels and that any ship that approaches it will be targeted.
keywords.context_translation: 伊朗表示将再次关闭霍尔木兹海峡，禁止商业船只通行，任何接近该海峡的船只都将成为目标。

keywords.definition_en: Discussion aimed at reaching an agreement between parties.
keywords.context_sentence: On negotiations to bring about an end to the war, the SNSC said new proposals had been put forward by the US, which Tehran was "currently reviewing and has not yet responded to".
keywords.context_translation: 关于旨在结束战争的谈判，伊朗最高国家安全委员会（SNSC）表示美国已提出新提议，德黑兰“目前正在审查，尚未回应”。

keywords.definition_en: A serious disagreement or struggle between opposing groups or ideas.
keywords.context_sentence: About 20% of the world's oil and liquefied natural gas (LNG) is usually transported through the strait, but the number of ships making the journey has dramatically decreased during the recent conflict, which began when the US and Israel attacked Iran on 28 February.
keywords.context_translation: 全球约20%的石油和液化天然气（LNG）通常通过该海峡运输，但在最近的冲突期间，进行这一航行的船只数量急剧减少，这场冲突始于2月28日美国和以色列袭击伊朗。

keywords.definition_en: To carry or move goods or people from one place to another.
keywords.context_sentence: About 20% of the world's oil and liquefied natural gas (LNG) is usually transported through the strait, but the number of ships making the journey has dramatically decreased during the recent conflict, which began when the US and Israel attacked Iran on 28 February.
keywords.context_translation: 全球约20%的石油和液化天然气（LNG）通常通过该海峡运输，但在最近的冲突期间，进行这一航行的船只数量急剧减少，这场冲突始于2月28日美国和以色列袭击伊朗。

keywords.definition_en: An act of breaking or failing to comply with a rule or agreement.
keywords.context_sentence: Iran's Supreme National Security Council (SNSC) said this was a violation of the ceasefire agreement and that it would stop the reopening of the strait while it was still in place.
keywords.context_translation: 伊朗最高国家安全委员会（SNSC）表示，这违反了停火协议，并将在协议仍有效时停止重新开放海峡。

keywords.definition_en: A temporary suspension of fighting, typically during a war.
keywords.context_sentence: A two-week ceasefire currently in effect is due to expire on 22 April.
keywords.context_translation: 目前生效的两周停火将于4月22日到期。

word_glossary.ukmto: 英国海上贸易行动办公室
